required_skills: Inventory Optimization and Safety Stock Planning
responsibilities: Develop inventory replenishment plans using demand forecasts, lead times, and safety stock policies to maintain target service levels.
Analyze inventory performance metrics and stock movements to identify excess inventory, shortages, and optimization opportunities.
Collaborate with procurement, logistics, and production teams to align inventory strategies with operational requirements and demand forecasts.
Implement inventory control processes that improve stock accuracy, reduce carrying costs, and enhance material availability.
Monitor inventory health indicators and recommend corrective actions to address slow-moving, obsolete, or at-risk inventory.
Build inventory planning reports and dashboards that provide visibility into stock levels, turnover rates, and service performance.
Conduct scenario analyses to evaluate inventory impacts from demand fluctuations, supplier constraints, and capacity limitations.
Optimize safety stock parameters and replenishment models to balance customer service objectives with working capital efficiency.
